menu.title: Soft Router Settings Menu
menu.subtitle: No plugin enable required; safe to use while the router plugin stays disabled.
menu.tipEsc: Tip: press ESC to go back
menu.tipPickNumber: Tip: pick by number; ESC also goes back
menu.pressAnyKey: Press any key to return (ESC also works)
language.title: Language settings
catalog.title: Model catalog
models.title: Kind -> Model Selection (Priority Lists)
models.chooseKind: Choose a kind to manage its model priority list.
keywords.title: Kind keyword management
keywords.comma: comma is allowed as a separator (tolerant)
keywords.noSets: No keyword sets found for this kind
keywords.currentModelList: Current model priority list for this kind:
keywords.hintStrong: strong hint: usually put the most representative core keywords with strong signals for this kind.
keywords.hintWeak: weak hint: usually put weak auxiliary related keywords—relevant to this kind, but not strong enough to classify on their own.
keywords.hintNegative: negative hint: usually put exclusion keywords or strong core keywords from other kinds.
keywords.hintSeparators: Supported separators: new lines, comma (,), Chinese comma (，), Chinese enumeration comma (、), and slash (/).
keywords.hintSpaceNote: Using plain spaces as separators is not recommended; if you need multi-word phrases, use commas, slashes, or new lines.
preview.title: Route Test (NO LLM calls)
preview.continuousHint: Tip: continuous mode. Enter submits; after results, press Enter for next; ESC to go back.
preview.paste: Enter test text to classify (single line, press Enter to submit):
preview.next: Press Enter for next (ESC to go back)
admin.title: Kind admin
admin.confirmDelete: You are about to DELETE kind:
admin.newKindSubtitle: You can continue directly to configure keywords, model lists, and priority order for this kind.
addKind.format: New kind id can be entered in English or Chinese. Allowed: letters/Chinese characters/digits/underscore, and it must start with a letter or 汉字 (e.g. finance_ai, 财务助手).
addKind.enter: Enter new kind id (English or Chinese)
addKind.done: Added kind. Next: configure keywords (menu 4) and model priority (menu 2).
prompt.addKeywords: Manually enter or paste keywords to ADD into {0}:
prompt.removeKeywords: Manually enter or paste keywords to REMOVE from {0}:
prompt.keywordInputHelp: ESC=back without saving / Back, Enter=save and return
taskMode.title: Task mode
taskMode.returnToPrimary: Return to primary model after temporary work
taskMode.manageKindsTip: Enter kind numbers to toggle membership in task mode; the primary kind is always kept.
error.catalogEmpty: Catalog is empty (run catalog refresh first?)
